acceptance_targets: [CH07-F001] PASS if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:19-27 contains no direct Imani entrance, movement, or spoken line while still delivering Eli's food/reminder beat; FAIL if Imani remains physically present in-scene.

[CH07-F002] PASS if the revised span at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:226-234 shows (1) one concrete bodily stress marker, (2) one line of dialogue that sounds uncontrolled rather than administrative, and (3) no tidy closure line equivalent to "I'll shut up now"; FAIL if the beat still resolves as polished self-commentary.

[CH07-F003] PASS if the revised lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:260-269 contain one observable on-road consequence plus Eli's immediate corrective action; FAIL if risk remains only forecasted by signs and internal worry.

[CH07-F007] PASS if the revised passage from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:184-233 contains at most two voicemail attempts and at least one new obstacle that materially alters Eli's payment or route assumptions on-page; FAIL if the section still repeats refusal without new causal pressure.

[FBR-008] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2292 to snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2293 no longer uses the 'landed like [object/sentence]' template and still escalates pressure. Fail if the same metaphor skeleton remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:19-27 contains no direct Imani entrance, movement, or spoken line while still delivering Eli's food/reminder beat; FAIL if Imani remains physically present in-scene.
findings.problem: Continuity contradiction: Imani appears on-page with dialogue and action in this chapter, but the continuity sheet marks her as off-page after chapter_06. This is a canonical availability mismatch.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the departure beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:19 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:27 so Imani is referenced off-page rather than physically present (or transfer her practical beat to Theo while preserving household dynamic texture).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:226-234 shows (1) one concrete bodily stress marker, (2) one line of dialogue that sounds uncontrolled rather than administrative, and (3) no tidy closure line equivalent to "I'll shut up now"; FAIL if the beat still resolves as polished self-commentary.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at a key boundary-violation moment: after June explicitly says "yes. for now. text only", Eli's immediate call is rendered in bureaucratic self-control language ("Received your text. I will stop calling") that softens coercive pressure instead of fully exposing the compulsion and harm in-scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:226 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:233, keep the boundary violation but rewrite the voicemail/aftermath with less managerial phrasing and more embodied consequence (breath, voice break, physical destabilization, immediate self-incriminating choice) without adding a moral safety-valve wrap-up.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:260-269 contain one observable on-road consequence plus Eli's immediate corrective action; FAIL if risk remains only forecasted by signs and internal worry.
findings.problem: Timidity in danger rendering: the chapter signals microsleep and brake degradation, but the prose pulls back before a fully embodied near-miss, muting the physical reality promised by the setup.
findings.rewrite_direction: Deepen the risk passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:260 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:269 with one concrete driving incident (lane breach, horn blast, skid, shoulder-catch, or equivalent) and Eli's immediate physical response before he chooses to continue.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:184-233 contains at most two voicemail attempts and at least one new obstacle that materially alters Eli's payment or route assumptions on-page; FAIL if the section still repeats refusal without new causal pressure.
findings.problem: Mid-to-late chapter progression stalls: multiple voicemail loops after the Nora call replay the same refusal dynamic before new external pressure arrives, reducing leverage-shift density.
findings.rewrite_direction: Condense one repeated voicemail loop between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:184 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:233 and use the recovered space for a new concrete obstacle affecting the Thursday transfer plan (cash loss, route delay, labor lead collapse, or equivalent).

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2292 to snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2293 no longer uses the 'landed like [object/sentence]' template and still escalates pressure. Fail if the same metaphor skeleton remains.
findings.problem: Recurring formula-metaphor pattern ('landed like ...') appears in 3 chapters and becomes mannered at this point. This chapter should REPLACE its instance.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the metaphor at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2292 with a concrete physiological/action reaction (e.g., breath, grip, pacing error, missed exit behavior) that is specific to this rest-stop moment.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
